questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = 'a8077ab3-19fa-44ba-bc93-1e67050e271c' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '62d0d755-0cff-46d9-bd71-2712aa5e3730'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = 'a8077ab3-19fa-44ba-bc93-1e67050e271c'; delete from question_items where id = 'a8077ab3-19fa-44ba-bc93-1e67050e271c';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
